subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood {DATE} – Final Vendor Roster for Your Review
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, attached is the confirmed vendor list for Taste of Bellwood on {DATE}. We have {NUM} food vendors and {NUM} craft booths confirmed. One slot opened up when {BIZ} withdrew last week; I'm holding it for a backup vendor. Everything else is on track. Let me know if you'd like any changes before we finalize signage and layout on {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, looks solid. Go ahead and lock in the backup vendor — your call on the fit. Keep me posted if anything shifts before the event.

subject_tmpl: Road Closure Request – {STREET} for Taste of Bellwood
body_tmpl: Frank, I need barricades and temporary no-parking signs on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS} from {TIME} on {DATE} through midnight. The event footprint expanded this year and we need that block clear for the main stage area. Can your crew drop equipment the evening before? I can have volunteers assist with placement if that helps.
reply_tmpl: Kevin — we can do the drop-off on {DATE} after 4 p.m. I'll assign two crew members. Make sure your volunteers have high-vis vests. Send me the final layout map by {DATE} so we know exactly where signs go.

subject_tmpl: Officer Coverage Request – Taste of Bellwood {DATE}
body_tmpl: Reggie, can you confirm officer assignments for the festival on {DATE}? Last year we had four officers on-site from {TIME} to {TIME} and that worked well. Anticipated attendance is {NUM} guests. I'll have a command tent set up near the main entrance if officers need a staging point. Please let me know headcount and any concerns by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Food Vendor Health Permits – Taste of Bellwood Verification
body_tmpl: Priya, attached are permit numbers for all {NUM} food vendors registered for the Taste of Bellwood on {DATE}. Two vendors — {BIZ} and {BIZ} — submitted late; I flagged them. Can your office verify all permits are current before I hand out booth assignments? I'd like to have clearance by {DATE} so we can finalize the map.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, I'll run the list today. The two late submitters will need to show original certificates on setup day — they're not fully cleared yet. I'll send you a go/no-go sheet by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Programming Proposal – Fall Family Festival at {STREET} Park
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I'd like to propose a new Fall Family Festival at {STREET} Park on {DATE}. The concept: a free afternoon event with pumpkin decorating, live music from local schools, and a small local vendor market. Estimated cost is {AMOUNT} — mostly sound equipment rental and supplies. I believe this fills a gap in our fall calendar and builds on the Taste of Bellwood momentum. I can have a full budget and logistics plan to you by {DATE} if you'd like to move forward.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, I like it. Pull together the budget and run it by Karen for budget-cycle fit. If it pencils out, let's aim for the October calendar.

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood Budget Reconciliation – Event {DATE}
body_tmpl: David, I'm submitting the post-event budget reconciliation for Taste of Bellwood. Total expenditures came in at {AMOUNT} against an approved budget of {AMOUNT}. Vendor deposits collected: {AMOUNT}. Net to the village: approximately {AMOUNT}. I'll have all receipts scanned and uploaded to the shared drive by {DATE}. Let me know if you need anything from me before you close out the event account.

subject_tmpl: Park Restroom Maintenance Status – {STREET} Park
body_tmpl: Kevin, heads up: the restroom block at {STREET} Park is showing a broken flush valve in stall two and a clogged drain in the utility sink. My crew has it scheduled for {DATE}, but if you have an event before then, let me know and I'll reprioritize. Also flagging the drinking fountain near the east entrance — it's running warm and may need a regulator check.
reply_tmpl: Frank, we have youth league games at {STREET} on {DATE} — can you push the repair to {DATE} or earlier? Drinking fountain is also a concern with summer heat coming.

subject_tmpl: Special Event Permit Filing – Taste of Bellwood {DATE}
body_tmpl: Yolanda, please find attached the special event permit application for Taste of Bellwood, scheduled for {DATE} on {STREET}. Application includes site map, insurance certificate (coverage: {AMOUNT}), and vendor list. Liquor service will be present — the permit addendum is included. Please confirm receipt and advise on any missing documentation.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, received. Everything looks complete on my end. I'll route the liquor addendum to the Clerk's licensing desk. Expect permit issuance by {DATE} barring any questions from the Village Board.

subject_tmpl: Stormwater Concern at {STREET} Park – Post-Rain Standing Water
body_tmpl: Tom, after the rains last week the low area near the north pavilion at {STREET} Park collected about {NUM} inches of standing water and it's still not draining {DAYS} days later. We have a scheduled event on {DATE} and I'm worried about the condition of that area. Can you or your team assess whether this is a drainage issue we need to address, or just soil saturation? Happy to walk it with you any morning this week.

subject_tmpl: Constituent Request – Shade Structures at {STREET} Park
body_tmpl: Kevin, I received a note from a resident about the lack of shade at {STREET} Park, especially along the bleacher line. They mentioned seniors and young kids struggling in the heat during afternoon events. Can you take a look at what it would cost to add a few shade sails or a canopy structure? I'd like a rough estimate and whether there's a grant angle — maybe something through OSLAD or AARP. Touch base with Tom too if it involves any site work.
reply_tmpl: Mayor, I'll reach out to Tom this week and pull together some options. OSLAD is worth exploring — I'll check the next application cycle. Should have a preliminary estimate to you by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Post-Event Cleanup Coordination – {STREET}, {DATE}
body_tmpl: Frank, can Public Works schedule a sweep of {STREET} and the adjacent park lot the morning after the festival — {DATE} starting at {TIME}? We typically need litter pickup, removal of any remaining barricades, and a power wash of the sidewalk near the food vendor zone. I'll have my team handle breaking down the tents and staging, so you just need to handle the roadway and hardscape. Let me know if that timeline works.

subject_tmpl: Vendor Update – {BIZ} Replacement for Taste of Bellwood
body_tmpl: Mayor, just a quick heads-up: {BIZ} cancelled their booth for the Taste of Bellwood citing a scheduling conflict. I've reached out to {BIZ} as a replacement — they participated last year and had good reviews. They've tentatively agreed, pending contract sign-off. If confirmed, the vendor count stays at {NUM}. No impact to layout or permitting. I'll update you once paperwork is signed.

subject_tmpl: Budget Approval Needed – Parks Event Line Item for Q{NUM}
body_tmpl: Kevin, the Board approved the parks programming budget for Q{NUM} at {AMOUNT}. This covers the Taste of Bellwood and the proposed Fall event. Please hold off on any commitments over {AMOUNT} per vendor until I route the spending authorization memo — should be in your inbox by {DATE}. If you anticipate any overruns based on current quotes, flag them to David and me before signing contracts.
reply_tmpl: Karen, understood. Current vendor quotes are all under threshold. I'll hold contracts until the memo comes through and copy David on anything over {AMOUNT}.

subject_tmpl: Parade Route Confirmation – {DATE} Event on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Frank, the Taste of Bellwood parade is scheduled for {DATE} at {TIME}. Route runs north on {STREET} from {CROSS} to {CROSS}, then east to the park entrance. We'll need the route clear of parked vehicles by {TIME}. I'm coordinating with Reggie on officer placement at each intersection. Can you confirm barricade placement is covered, or do I need to loop in a private contractor for the overflow intersections?
reply_tmpl: Kevin, we'll handle {STREET} to {CROSS}. Beyond that you'll need to coordinate with the county — that stretch is not village-maintained. I'll have barricades staged at the DPW yard by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Temporary Tent Permit Needed – Taste of Bellwood {DATE}
body_tmpl: Rosa, I'm submitting for {NUM} temporary tent permits for Taste of Bellwood on {DATE}. Tents range from 10x10 to 40x60. The large stage tent requires a structural inspection — I've noted that in the application. All tent vendors are providing manufacturer load ratings and fire-retardant certifications. Can you confirm the inspection can be scheduled for the setup day, {DATE}?
reply_tmpl: Kevin, I can get an inspector out on the morning of {DATE}. Make sure the 40x60 tent crew has the permit posted and the cert packet on-site. I'll call you if anything fails initial walkthrough.

subject_tmpl: Spring Park Inspection Summary – {DATE}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I completed the annual spring park inspection across all {NUM} village parks. Overall conditions are good. Key findings: the playground equipment at {STREET} Park needs one swing seat replaced (low cost, ordering now); the basketball court at {STREET} has visible cracking that should be seal-coated before summer league starts; and the {STREET} pavilion roof is showing wear — I've asked Tom to assess. I'll send a full inspection report by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Site Assessment – {STREET} Park Drainage, Results
body_tmpl: Kevin, my crew assessed the north pavilion area at {STREET} Park on {DATE}. The low spot is collecting runoff from the adjacent parking lot — we have a partially blocked inlet about {NUM} feet east of the pavilion. We can clear the blockage within a week. Longer term, I'd recommend a grading correction along the west edge of the lot; I can include that in the capital plan for FY{NUM}. The area should be passable for your {DATE} event once the inlet is cleared.
reply_tmpl: Tom, great — please prioritize the inlet clearing so we're good for {DATE}. Add the grading project to the capital list and flag it to Karen when you compile the FY plan.

subject_tmpl: Noise Ordinance Question – Amplified Music at {STREET} Park
body_tmpl: Reggie, quick question: the Taste of Bellwood main stage will run amplified music until {TIME}. Our ordinance allows outdoor amplified sound until {TIME} with a special events exception. We applied for the exception but I haven't seen it formally approved in writing yet. Can you confirm whether PD has a record of the approval, or should I circle back to Yolanda's office? I want to make sure stage-end time is defensible if there are complaints.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, I don't have anything in writing on our end. Loop in Yolanda — the exception has to come from the Clerk's office. Once it's issued, send me a copy so the watch commander has it on file for that night.

subject_tmpl: Rodent Activity Reported Near {STREET} Park Pavilion
body_tmpl: Priya, maintenance reported rodent activity near the pavilion dumpster at {STREET} Park — gnaw marks on a trash bin lid and droppings near the foundation. This is the site for an upcoming event on {DATE}. Can you arrange an inspection and treatment before then? I'll make sure the dumpster lid is secured going forward and the area is kept clean, but your office should confirm it's resolved before we have food vendors set up nearby.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, I'll send a vector control inspection out on {DATE}. If we confirm activity, treatment can happen same week. Keep the area around the dumpster clear of food debris in the meantime.

subject_tmpl: Youth Summer Programming – Proposed Schedule for {DATE}–{DATE}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I've drafted the youth summer programming calendar for {DATE} through {DATE}. We're proposing {NUM} weeks of structured activities at {STREET} Park including sports clinics, art workshops, and a weekly movie night. Estimated cost is {AMOUNT}, partially offset by a {AMOUNT} grant we received from the Cook County Youth Initiative. I'd like to present this at the next staff meeting. Does {DATE} work for a quick overview?
reply_tmpl: Kevin, {DATE} works. Put it on the agenda with Karen. This is exactly the kind of summer programming we should be leading with — good work pulling in the county grant.

subject_tmpl: Portable Restroom Placement – {STREET} Event {DATE}
body_tmpl: Frank, for the {DATE} event at {STREET} Park we'll have {NUM} portable restrooms delivered by a private vendor on {DATE} at {TIME}. I'm planning to place them along the {STREET} side of the lot, away from food booths. Can you confirm there are no conflicts with any scheduled utility work in that area? Also, the vendor needs a contact for gate access — can I give them your cell, or should I handle it?
reply_tmpl: Kevin, no utility conflicts on our end for that area. Have the vendor call the DPW yard at {PHONE} — whoever is on shift will handle the gate. Make sure they're off the lot by midnight on {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood Planning Update – {DATE} Briefing
body_tmpl: Mayor, brief status on Taste of Bellwood planning for your awareness. Kevin has vendor applications at {NUM}% capacity. PW confirmed road closure logistics. Health permits are being verified by Priya's office. One outstanding item: the stage sound vendor has not yet submitted their certificate of insurance — Kevin is following up. No action needed from you at this time, but wanted you current ahead of next week's press inquiry.

subject_tmpl: Draft Mayor's Remarks – Taste of Bellwood Opening Ceremony {DATE}
body_tmpl: Tina, can you help me draft opening remarks for Mayor Okonkwo for the Taste of Bellwood on {DATE}? He'll be speaking at {TIME} from the main stage. Key points to hit: welcoming the community, thanking vendors, recognizing the Parks team and volunteers, and a brief mention of upcoming summer programming. Remarks should run about {NUM} minutes. Let me know what you need from me.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, I'll have a draft to you by {DATE}. Send me a list of any vendors or sponsors you want mentioned by name so I can work them in.

subject_tmpl: Vendor Deposit Checks – Taste of Bellwood, Please Process
body_tmpl: David, attached are {NUM} vendor deposit checks for the Taste of Bellwood, totaling {AMOUNT}. Please credit to the parks events account. One check from {BIZ} is dated {DATE} — it's a post-dated check, so please hold it until then. All others are available for immediate deposit. Let me know if there are any issues with any of the checks.

subject_tmpl: Park Equipment Grant Application – OSLAD Cycle {DATE}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I've prepared a draft OSLAD grant application for new playground equipment and shade structures at {STREET} Park. Total ask: {AMOUNT}, with a required village match of {AMOUNT}. The application is due {DATE}. I need your signature on the resolution of support and the authorized official certification form before I submit. Can I get on your calendar for {DAYS} minutes before {DATE}?
reply_tmpl: Kevin, set it up with Tina for {DATE} and bring both documents. I'll sign that day.

subject_tmpl: Confirmed Officer Assignments – Taste of Bellwood {DATE}
body_tmpl: Kevin, confirmed: we'll have {NUM} officers on-site for Taste of Bellwood from {TIME} to {TIME} on {DATE}. The Watch Commander will also have a patrol car making loops through the perimeter. I've briefed the assigned officers on the layout — send me your final vendor map when it's ready so I can share it. If crowd estimates change significantly, let me know so I can request additional resources.
reply_tmpl: Reggie, thanks for confirming. Final map will be in your inbox by {DATE}. Current attendance estimate is holding at {NUM}.

subject_tmpl: Electrical Service for Taste of Bellwood – Generator vs. Pedestal Tap
body_tmpl: Frank, I'm trying to decide between renting a generator vs. tapping the park electrical pedestal for the main stage and {NUM} vendor rows at the Taste of Bellwood. Last year the pedestal at {STREET} Park tripped twice. Has your team inspected it recently? If it's not rated for the load, I'll go generator only and save myself the headache. Just need your assessment before I finalize rental contracts by {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, the pedestal was upgraded in {DATE} — it should handle up to {NUM} amps now. I'll have an electrician confirm load capacity this week and email you the spec sheet. You may still want a small generator as backup for the stage.

subject_tmpl: Holiday Lights Proposal – {STREET} Park Winter Display
body_tmpl: Mayor, I'd like to propose a holiday lights display at {STREET} Park this winter, running from {DATE} to {DATE}. I've gotten informal quotes from {NUM} vendors ranging from {AMOUNT} to {AMOUNT} for installation and takedown. We could offset some cost by selling hot cocoa and welcoming a food vendor for the opening weekend. Community feedback at last year's events suggested residents want more winter programming. Interested in pursuing this?
reply_tmpl: Kevin, I'm interested. Get me a formal quote and a draft budget. If it's under {AMOUNT} all-in I'll take it to the Board informally before the next meeting.

subject_tmpl: Liquor License Addendum – Taste of Bellwood Beer Garden {DATE}
body_tmpl: Yolanda, I need to confirm the beer garden licensing for the Taste of Bellwood on {DATE}. The licensed operator is {BIZ} (license #{ACCT}). The beer garden will be enclosed by temporary fencing in the northeast quadrant of the event footprint. Hours of service: {TIME} to {TIME}. Please let me know if we need any additional documentation or if the Village Board needs to act before {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, the Board can ratify the beer garden addendum at the {DATE} meeting — it's a routine consent item. Make sure {BIZ} has wristband procedures and a 21+ verification plan documented; I'll need that for the file.

subject_tmpl: Capital Improvement Request – {STREET} Park Walking Path Repair
body_tmpl: Tom, the walking path at {STREET} Park has significant heaving and cracking along the {STREET}-facing section — roughly {NUM} linear feet. I've gotten complaints from residents and the condition is borderline ADA non-compliant. Can you get this into the FY{NUM} capital plan for milling and patching? I can provide photos and specific location markers. Ideally the work happens in spring before our outdoor programming season starts.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, I'll add it to the capital list. Send the photos and I'll do a quick field check. If it's ADA exposure, we may be able to accelerate it under the accessibility line item.

subject_tmpl: Resident Complaint – Noise from {STREET} Park Event on {DATE}
body_tmpl: Kevin, I received a complaint from a resident on {STREET} about amplified music from the park event on {DATE}. They said it was audible until approximately {TIME} — past the {TIME} ordinance cutoff. Can you look into whether the event ran long and what our event contract says about sound curfews? I want to be able to respond to this resident with something concrete. Please send me a brief summary by {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Mayor, I've reviewed the event log. Music stopped at {TIME} per our contract with the sound vendor. The complaint may relate to a private party at an adjacent address — I'll check with Reggie. I'll have a full summary to you by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Pre-Event Food Safety Walkthrough Request – {DATE}
body_tmpl: Priya, would it be possible to have someone from your office do a walkthrough of the food vendor booths during setup on {DATE}? Setup begins at {TIME} and vendors should be substantially ready by {TIME}. This is for the Taste of Bellwood. We had a minor temperature issue with one vendor last year and I'd like your team's eyes on things before gates open at {TIME}. Even an hour on-site would be helpful.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, I'll have a health inspector at the site by {TIME} on setup day. Have all vendor contact names and permit numbers ready at the check-in tent. Any vendor not ready for inspection by {TIME} will need to wait for re-inspection before they can open.

subject_tmpl: Post-Event Recap – Taste of Bellwood {DATE}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, here's my quick recap of Taste of Bellwood {DATE}: estimated attendance {NUM}, vendor count {NUM}, no significant incidents. Feedback from vendors and residents has been positive — several vendors asked to return next year. Net revenue to the village after costs: approximately {AMOUNT}. One follow-up item: the {STREET} crosswalk near the main entrance needs repainting before next year. Overall, a successful event. Full report in your inbox by {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, excellent work. Flag the crosswalk to Frank. Start thinking about next year's date and let's lock the calendar early — we keep getting beat to the summer weekend by neighboring villages.

subject_tmpl: Tree Removal Request – {STREET} Park, Storm Damage
body_tmpl: Frank, the large oak near the pavilion at {STREET} Park took significant damage in last week's storm — three major limbs are down and the remaining crown looks unstable. I've flagged it off with caution tape for now. Can your crew or a contracted arborist assess and, if needed, remove it? We have programming at that park starting {DATE} and I don't want to have the area closed any longer than necessary. Also, the downed limbs are partially blocking the south path.

subject_tmpl: Staffing Request – Part-Time Seasonal Parks Workers for Summer
body_tmpl: Karen, I'd like to request authorization to hire {NUM} part-time seasonal parks workers for the period {DATE} through {DATE}. These positions are budgeted in the approved parks operating budget at {AMOUNT} each. Duties include park maintenance, event setup/breakdown, and summer programming support. HR has candidate applications ready — I just need your sign-off to proceed with interviews. Can you authorize this week so we can get people onboarded before the season ramps up?
reply_tmpl: Kevin, you're authorized. Loop in HR to schedule interviews. Make sure the onboarding includes the safety orientation — I'll have that updated protocol to you by {DATE}.
